notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson grounds into a double play, shortstop Konnor Griffin to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Dylan Beavers out at 2nd. Jeremiah Jackson out at 1st.
